testcase.name: test_11_non_notary_cannot_complete_request

failure.message: AssertionError: Failed to get admin token assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_notarization_completion_email.py:447: in test_11_non_notary_cannot_complete_request assert admin_token is not None, "Failed to get admin token" E AssertionError: Failed to get admin token E assert None is not None
